About the Template

Built for Philippine Payroll Compliance

Stop doing payroll from scratch every month. This Excel template handles all the computations automatically — from gross pay to statutory deductions — so you can process payroll in minutes, not hours.

Designed by licensed CPAs with deep knowledge of BIR TRAIN Law, SSS, PhilHealth, and Pag-IBIG regulations effective 2026.

  • Auto-computed SSS, PhilHealth & Pag-IBIG contributions - 2026 Update
  • BIR withholding tax table (TRAIN Law 2026 rates)
  • 13th month pay & holiday pay calculator
  • Works on Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets
  • No macros required — fully formula-based
  • Printable payslip layout included

New Product

Professional Accounting System PH v2026

Stop doing bookkeeping manually. This complete Excel-based accounting system handles your entire financial recording process — from journal entries to financial statements — automatically and in full compliance with Philippine standards.

Designed by a licensed CPA with deep knowledge of PFRS for SMEs, BIR requirements, TRAIN Law, and the CREATE Act. Perfect for sole proprietors, bookkeepers, freelance accountants, and small corporations.

  • Complete Chart of Accounts — PH standard account numbers
  • Smart General Journal with double-entry validation (✓ BALANCED indicator)
  • Auto-generated General Ledger & Trial Balance by period
  • Income Statement — auto-populated from Trial Balance via macro
  • Balance Sheet — cumulative period-end balances
  • Cash Flow Statement — Indirect Method (Operating, Investing, Financing)
  • Philippine Income Tax Reference Table (TRAIN Law & CREATE Act)
  • Income Tax Calculator — Graduated rates & 8% flat tax option

What's Included

Complete Accounting System — 8 Powerful Sheets

One workbook. Everything you need to run full double-entry bookkeeping and generate Philippine-compliant financial statements for any business.

📋

Chart of Accounts

Pre-built Philippine-standard chart of accounts with account numbers, types, normal balances, and financial statement mapping.

  • Assets, Liabilities, Equity accounts
  • Revenue & Expense accounts
  • Linked to all other sheets
📓

General Journal

Smart monthly ledger with live double-entry validation. Auto-tags month from date. Color-coded input cells for easy use.

  • ✓ BALANCED indicator
  • Blue = input, Green = auto-filled
  • Filter by month or view all
📊

General Ledger & Trial Balance

Auto-populated from journal entries. Filter by period — monthly, quarterly, or annual. Macro-generated output.

  • Period type & value selector
  • Net balance per account
  • Macro button to generate FS
📈

Income Statement

Auto-populated from Trial Balance. Revenue, COGS, Operating Expenses, Other Income/Expense, and Net Income computation.

  • Gross profit calculation
  • Operating income (EBIT)
  • PFRS for SMEs format
🏦

Balance Sheet

Cumulative period-end balances showing current & non-current assets, liabilities, and equity — BIR and bank submission ready.

  • Current & non-current assets
  • Liabilities & equity section
  • Total assets = Total L+E check
💧

Cash Flow Statement

Indirect method cash flow auto-populated by macro. Covers Operating, Investing, and Financing activities with account references.

  • Operating activities (A/R, Inventory, etc.)
  • Investing activities (PP&E)
  • Financing activities (loans, capital)
🧾

Income Tax Reference Table

Complete 2025 Philippine income tax reference per TRAIN Law & CREATE Act — individual, corporate, and VAT rates included.

  • Graduated individual tax rates
  • 8% flat tax option rules
  • CREATE Act corporate rates & MCIT
🔢

Income Tax Calculator

Interactive tax calculator supporting Individual (Compensation), Self-Employed, Mixed Income, and Corporation taxpayer types.

  • Graduated rates & 8% flat tax
  • Partnership/Corporation NTI
  • Auto-computed tax per bracket

What's Included

Everything You Need for Payroll

One file. Multiple sheets. Complete payroll solution for sole proprietors, SMEs, and growing corporations.

📊

Master Payroll Sheet

Main payroll register with auto-calculated gross pay, deductions, and net pay for up to UNLIMITED employees per period (50 pre-populated).

  • Weekly, Semi-monthly or monthly payroll
  • Overtime & holiday pay columns
  • Late/absent deduction rows
🏛️

SSS Contribution Table

Updated 2026 SSS contribution schedule with automatic lookup based on employee salary bracket.

  • Employee & employer shares
  • MPF (Mandatory Provident Fund)
  • Auto-VLOOKUP formula
🏥

PhilHealth Schedule

Premium contribution rates based on the PhilHealth 2026 schedule, automatically applied per employee salary range.

  • Latest 2026 5% premium rate applied
  • Salary floor & ceiling built-in
  • Employer share included
🏠

Pag-IBIG Fund

Pag-IBIG HDMF deduction table with correct employee and employer contributions per existing regulations.

  • 1%-2% standard deduction, maxed at ₱200
  • Employer matching column
📋

BIR Withholding Tax

Tax withheld on compensation using the TRAIN Law revised tax table. Monthly and annual views included.

  • TRAIN Law 2026 tax brackets
  • Annualized tax computation
  • Substituted filing basis
🧾

Payslip Template

Clean, printable payslip for each employee showing all earnings, deductions, and net pay — ready to distribute.

  • Print-ready flexible format
  • Company name & logo field
  • One-click per-employee view

Simple Steps to Get Your Template

Complete Your Payment

Confirm the ₱499 payment inside your app. The transaction is processed securely by PayMongo.
